title: echinocereus cirrhifer
intro: Echinocereus cirrhifer, commonly known as the chain fruit cholla, is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties and has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The health benefits of Echinocereus cirrhifer include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been reported to help in wound healing and reducing pain. However, I don't have information on the specific therapeutic actions, bioactive constituents of this plant.

side_effects: Echinocereus cirrhifer can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues in some individuals. Ingesting the plant or its extracts can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to the presence of toxic compounds like glycosides and alkaloids.
